title: wrong results for group by queries in the presence of primary keys
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE facts (a_id BIGINT, b_id BIGINT, value DOUBLE);
SELECT b.name, c.id, c.name, SUM(f.value) FROM facts f LEFT JOIN a ON f.a_id = a.id LEFT JOIN b ON f.b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN c ON a.c_id = c.id GROUP BY b.name, c.id, c.name;
key_bug_features: group by queries with primary keys in joins
